name: Monk embeds Berserker behavior into a solo run

planSteps.description: Enter TestSprite-3113 into the input with data-testid player-name
Click the button with data-testid confirm-player-name
Click the button with data-testid class-monk
The button with data-testid class-monk has aria-pressed true
The element with data-testid selected-class-name has text Monk
The element with data-testid selected-class-weapons has text Garlic Aura
The element with data-testid selected-class-behavior-name has text Berserker
Click the button with data-testid battle-open
The dialog with data-testid battle-modal is visible
Click the button with data-testid deploy-solo
The element with data-testid result-score contains a number
The hidden element with id game-state has data-mode equal to solo
The hidden element with id game-state has data-class equal to monk
The hidden element with id game-state has data-temperament equal to berserker
